features: Christmas Hair Clip: You will receive a set of 10 cute Christmas hair clips. The hair clip set is designed with various Christmas patterns, such as Jingle Bells & Holly, Christmas tree, Christmas stocking, wreath, candy cane, snowman, gift, house, etc. Classic Christmas elements, the collision of red and green tones creates a strong festive atmosphere. Wearing it is not only for decorative purposes, but also a beautiful expectation and blessing for Christmas.

High-Quality Material: Our hair clips are made of high-quality plastic, resin, and metal, non-toxic and odorless, sturdy and durable, with bright colors and a delicate texture. The clip has moderate elasticity, which can firmly fix it on the hair without hurting the scalp. It is comfortable and burden-free to wear for a long time. Compact and exquisite, lightweight, convenient to carry around, the snap-on hair clip is easy to wear and use, making it easy to add highlights to hairstyles.

Versatile & Practical: Whether paired with a Christmas jumper, a cozy coat, or your everyday hoodie or dress, this clip fits right in. Use it to secure a ponytail, pin back bangs, or as an embellishment for braids, and add Christmas colors to your outfit. Whether it's a family Christmas dinner, a friend's Christmas party, or going out shopping or taking photos, you can fully showcase your festive atmosphere.

Wide Application: These cute Christmas hair clips can keep your hair tidy and dry when washing your face, morning beauty routine, make-up, cooking, or keeping your hair out of the water when bath. These Xmas headdress accessories are also suitable for parties, ceremonies, Christmas, birthdays, banquets, performances, photography, and daily wear.

Christmas Gift: This beautiful hair clip set can not only serve as a unique accessory for party hair accessories, but also as the perfect Christmas gift for children, friends, and relatives. Let this hairpin, carrying the joy of Christmas, become a warm surprise received by the other party, witnessing each other's wonderful moments.
